case_title: FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. CHRISTOPHER HOLBROOK et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE SERVED JUL-08-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, CHRISTOPHER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-04-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-22-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-04-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-06-2002
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, CHRISTOPHER $3,837.32 PRINCIPAL, $169.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,006.32, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 HOURS
DECLARATION TYE ALLENBRAND FILED RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION CRYSTAL KELLY FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-22-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, CHRISTOPHER
